instruction:
Let the population $x$ follow a Poisson distribution with parameter λ. $X_1, X_2$ are simple random samples of $x$, and $\bar{X}, S^2$ are the sample mean and sample variance respectively. Then $P(X_{1}=1|\bar{X}=1)=().$

Options:
A. $\frac{2}{5}$
B. $\frac{3}{7}$
C. $\frac{5}{6}$
D. $\frac{3}{8}$
E. $\frac{4}{9}$
F. $\frac{1}{2}$
G. $\frac{1}{4}$
H. $\frac{7}{10}$
I. $\frac{1}{3}$
J. $\frac{6}{11}$
